description: A Node.js developer's Docker environment is broken. The application crashes immediately upon starting with 'Error: Cannot find module express', even though the Dockerfile correctly runs 'npm install'. Fix the docker-compose.yml configuration in /home/ga/projects/shadow-bug/ so that the application starts successfully and responds at http://localhost:3000, the bind mount .:/app remains active for hot-reloading, and the node_modules installed inside the image are preserved and not hidden by the host's directory. Constraint: Do NOT run npm install on the host machine; dependencies must come from the container image.
